languages.text: "Моя личная комм-бусина тоже не работает. Обычно флагман может связаться со мной, а сейчас какие-то помехи".
"My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."
languages.original_text: "Моя личная комм-бусина тоже не работает. Обычно флагман может связаться со мной, а сейчас какие-то помехи".

traits.locale_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Usually, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."
"My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Usually, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."
"My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."
"My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."
"My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

languages.text: "Mein persönlicher Voxstecker funktioniert auch nicht. Normalerweise erreicht mich das Flaggschiff darüber, aber irgendeine Interferenz scheint ihn zu stören.
languages.original_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

traits.locale_text: "Mein persönlicher Voxstecker funktioniert auch nicht. Normalerweise erreicht mich das Flaggschiff darüber, aber irgendeine Interferenz scheint ihn zu stören.

languages.text: « Mon communicateur personnel ne fonctionne pas non plus. Normalement, le vaisseau amiral peut me contacter à tout instant, mais pour l'heure, les canaux sont brouillés. »
languages.original_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

traits.locale_text: « Mon communicateur personnel ne fonctionne pas non plus. Normalement, le vaisseau amiral peut me contacter à tout instant, mais pour l'heure, les canaux sont brouillés. »

languages.text: «Mi cuenta personal de comunicación tampoco funciona. Normalmente, la nave insignia puede contactar conmigo, pero ahora hay interferencias de algún tipo».
languages.original_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

traits.locale_text: «Mi cuenta personal de comunicación tampoco funciona. Normalmente, la nave insignia puede contactar conmigo, pero ahora hay interferencias de algún tipo».

languages.text: "Şahsi telsizim de çalışmıyor. Normalde sancak gemisi bana ulaşabilirdi ama bir tür parazit duyuyorum."
languages.original_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

traits.locale_text: "Şahsi telsizim de çalışmıyor. Normalde sancak gemisi bana ulaşabilirdi ama bir tür parazit duyuyorum."

languages.text: “我的私人通讯珠也失灵了。正常情况下，旗舰可以联系到我，但现在明显有干扰。”
languages.original_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

traits.locale_text: “我的私人通讯珠也失灵了。正常情况下，旗舰可以联系到我，但现在明显有干扰。”

languages.text: 「私の個人用通信ヘッドも故障している。通常は旗艦から連絡が取れるはずだが、今は何らかの妨害を受けている」
languages.original_text: "My personal comm-bead isn't working either. Normally, the flagship can reach me, but now there's some kind of interference."

traits.locale_text: 「私の個人用通信ヘッドも故障している。通常は旗艦から連絡が取れるはずだが、今は何らかの妨害を受けている」
